# printhub

[![Homepage](https://img.shields.io/badge/docs-default)](https://tscad.vercel.app)

<!-- #endregion header -->

## Idea

- Online platform to configure models
- Use openscad-wasm to generate previews and STLs on the fly
- Store and share configurations
- Order prints directly from the platform
- Integrate with existing print services (e.g. PrusaPrinters, Printify, etc.)
- Use scad-js to allow more complex model configurations
- Form from JSON schema: https://rjsf-team.github.io/react-jsonschema-form/
- Separate/customize model for viewer and printing (e.g. lower res for viewer, higher res for printing, orientation, supports, etc.)
- Use vercel sandbox to render user provided models from GitHub/npm safely
  - Or wasm-git https://github.com/petersalomonsen/wasm-git
- Users upload their own models:
  - Create directly in the playground
  - Store Sourcecode in Payload CMS
  - Bundle on server in payload cms hook
